zh.lifeSummary: 當Malcolm De Atholl於1140年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾阿爾時，他的父親Madach first Earl of Athol55歲，母親Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess65歲。他於1145年與Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾巴登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1149年在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾被列為earl of atholl, 2nd earl of athol madadsson。他去世於1198年4月24日在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年58歲，埋葬在奧地利波麥庫頓格馬林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malcolm De Atholl于1140年出生在英国苏格兰培爾阿爾时，他的父亲Madach first Earl of Athol55岁，母亲Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess65岁。他于1145年与Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl在英国苏格兰音巴內-爾巴登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1149年在苏格兰培爾阿爾被列为earl of atholl, 2nd earl of athol madadsson。他去世于1198年4月24日在英国苏格兰培爾享年58岁，埋葬在奥地利波麥庫頓格馬林。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Atholl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Athol
meanings: Scottish: A male name derived from Athol, in Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Malcolm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the medieval Gaelic name Mael Coluim ‘devotee of St Columba’. Columba was a 6th-century monk of Irish origin who played a leading part in the conversion to Christianity of Scotland and northern England; see also Callum and Colm . He has always been one of the most popular saints in Scotland, but in the Middle Ages it was felt to be presumptuous to give the names of saints directly to children; instead their blessing was invoked by prefixing the name with mael ‘devotee of’ or gille ‘servant of’. Since the 1930s the given name has been used widely in the English-speaking world, not just by those with Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Malcolm De Atholl was born in 1140, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Madach first Earl of Athol, was 55 and his mother, Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess, was 65. He married Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl in 1145, in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. In 1149, at the age of 11, his occupation is listed as earl of atholl, 2nd earl of athol madadsson in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland. He died on 24 April 1198, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Malin, Kuttenberg, Bohemia, Austria.

fr.Castle Moulin, East Lothian, Scotland: Castle, Jackson, Dakota du Sud, États-Unis
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malcolm De Atholl est né en 1140, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Madach first Earl of Athol, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess, avait 65 ans. Il a épousé Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl en 1145, à Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. En 1149, à l’âge de 11 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est earl of atholl, 2nd earl of athol madadsson à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1198, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Malin, Kuttenberg, Bohême, Autriche.

de.Castle Moulin, East Lothian, Scotland: Castle, Jackson, South Dakota, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als Malcolm De Atholl 1140 in Atholl, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Madach first Earl of Athol 55 und seine Mutter Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess 65. Er hat 1145 in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1149, als er 11 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als earl of atholl, 2nd earl of athol madadsson in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. April 1198 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Malin, Kuttenberg, Böhmen, Österreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm De Atholl è nato il nel 1140 nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Madach first Earl of Athol, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess, aveva 65 anni. Lui sposato Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl nel 1145, nel Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1149, all'età di 11 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come earl of atholl, 2nd earl of athol madadsson nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland. Morì il 24 aprile 1198, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Malin, Kuttenberg, Böhmen, Austria.

ja.lifeSummary: Malcolm De Athollが1140年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルで生まれた時，父Madach first Earl of Atholは55歳，母Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countessは65歳であった。1145年にイギリススコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアバデノチでHextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Athollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1149年，11歳の時，スコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルでの職業はearl of atholl, 2nd earl of athol madadssonと記録されている。彼は1198年4月24日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで58歳で死去し，オーストリアブoメンクッテンバーグマリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Malcolm De Atholl(이)가 1140년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Madach first Earl of Athol(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess(은)는 65세였다. 그는 1145년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르 바데노치에서 Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1149년, 11세의 나이로 그의 직업은 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 earl of atholl, 2nd earl of athol madadsson이었다. 그는 1198년 4월 24일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트리아 브oh멘 쿠텐버그 맬린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malcolm De Atholl nasceu em 1140, em Atholl, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Madach first Earl of Athol, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess, tinha 65 anos. Ele casou-se com Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl em 1145, em Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1149, com 11 anos, sua profissão aparece como earl of atholl, 2nd earl of athol madadsson em Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1198, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Malin, Kuttenberg, Böhmen, Áustria.

ru.Castle Moulin, East Lothian, Scotland: кастл, джекксон, Южная Дакота, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malcolm De Atholl родился в 1140 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Madach first Earl of Athol было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess, 65. Он женился на женщине по имени Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl в 1145 г. в местности баденох, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. В 1149 году, в возрасте 11 год,  он работал по профессии earl of atholl, 2nd earl of athol madadsson в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия. Он умер 24 апреля 1198 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности малинь, куттенбирг, бoхмен, Австрия.

es.Castle Moulin, East Lothian, Scotland: Castle, Jackson, Dakota del Sur, Estados Unidos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Malcolm De Atholl nació en 1140, en Atholl, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Madach first Earl of Athol, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Margaret Haakonsdater Countess Countess, tenía 65 años. Se casó con Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl en 1145, en Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1149, a la edad de 11 años, su ocupación registrada era earl of atholl, 2nd earl of athol madadsson en Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland. Murió el 24 de abril de 1198, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Malin, Kuttenberg, Böhmen, Austria.
